Welcome to our Live Chat! We're here to help with all your travel inquiries. Ask us anything about bookings, destinations, or any other travel assistance you need. Our knowledgeable agents are ready to provide prompt and reliable support for a seamless travel experience. Let's get started on your journey!

We're sorry if you've had any issues. Our team is here to listen, understand, and find solutions. Please share your concerns, and we'll do everything we can to make things right for you. Your satisfaction matters to us.

Thank you for chatting with us. We are away now. A customer representative will respond as soon as we return.

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us for your holiday package request! We appreciate your interest.

To help us process your inquiry efficiently and provide you with the best options, please send us an email at holidays@wakanow.com with the following details:

* Your desired destination(s)
* Your preferred travel dates
* The number of travellers
* Any specific preferences or requirements you might have

You can also browse our pre-configured holiday packages on our Instagram page:

Once you've reviewed our Instagram packages, please indicate in your email which package(s) you are interested in, or provide the details mentioned above for a custom quote.

We will get back to you as soon as possible during our regular business hours.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

The Wakanow Holiday Team
